A

add(JMenu) - Method in class View.RunLogic.CustomMenuBar
 
addPokedexEntry(int, String, int) - Method in class BLL.PokedexBLL
Adds a new Pokédex entry by validating and passing the details to the DAL layer.
addPokemon(int, int, int) - Method in class BLL.PokemonBLL
Adds a new Pokémon by validating and passing the details to the DAL layer.
addRegion(String) - Method in class BLL.RegionBLL
Adds a new region by validating and passing the details to the DAL layer.
addTrainer(String, int, String, String) - Method in class BLL.TrainerBLL
Adds a new trainer by validating and passing the details to the DAL layer.
addType(String) - Method in class BLL.TypeChartBLL
Adds a new type by validating and passing the details to the DAL layer.
assignType(int, int) - Method in class DAL.PokedexDAL
Assigns a type to a Pokémon by inserting a value into the PokemonTypes Associative Entity table.
assignType(int, int, Connection) - Method in class BLL.PokedexBLL
Assigns a type to a Pokédex entry in the database.
AssignType - Class in View.CRUDLogic
A GUI form for assigning a type to a Pokédex entry.
AssignType(Connection, RefreshTableCallback) - Constructor for class View.CRUDLogic.AssignType
Constructs the AssignType form with a database connection.

B

BLL - package BLL
The Business Logic Layer (BLL) handles the core functionality of the application, interacting with data models and ensuring that business rules are applied.
buildGUI() - Method in class View.RunLogic.GUIBuilder
Sets up and displays the main GUI for the application.

C

connect() - Method in class DAL.DatabaseConnector
Establishes a connection to the MySQL database using URL, user, and password.
createPokedexTable() - Method in class View.CRUDLogic.PokedexTable
Creates and returns the JPanel that contains the Pokédex table with dynamic resizing and sorting functionality.
createPokemonTable() - Method in class View.CRUDLogic.PokemonTable
Creates and returns the JPanel that contains the Pokémon table with dynamic resizing and sorting functionality.
createRegionTable() - Method in class View.CRUDLogic.RegionTable
Creates and returns the JPanel that contains the region table with dynamic resizing and sorting functionality.
createTrainerTable() - Method in class View.CRUDLogic.TrainerTable
Creates and returns the JPanel that contains the trainer table with dynamic resizing and sorting functionality.
createTypeChartEntryTable() - Method in class View.CRUDLogic.TypeChartEntryTable
Creates and returns the JPanel that contains the type chart entry table with dynamic resizing and sorting functionality.
CustomMenuBar - Class in View.RunLogic
CustomMenuBar is a custom implementation of a JMenuBar with a maroon background to match the application's theme.
CustomMenuBar() - Constructor for class View.RunLogic.CustomMenuBar
 

D

DAL - package DAL
The Data Access Layer (DAL) manages database interactions, handling CRUD operations.
DatabaseConnector - Class in DAL
Handles the connection to the MySQL database for the application.
DatabaseConnector(String, String) - Constructor for class DAL.DatabaseConnector
Constructs a DatabaseConnector instance with the provided user credentials.
deletePokedexEntry(int) - Method in class BLL.PokedexBLL
Deletes a Pokédex entry after confirming the entry exists.
deletePokedexEntry(int) - Method in class DAL.PokedexDAL
Deletes a Pokédex entry from the database if the entry exists.
DeletePokedexEntry - Class in View.CRUDLogic
A GUI form for deleting a trainer from the database.
DeletePokedexEntry(Connection, RefreshTableCallback) - Constructor for class View.CRUDLogic.DeletePokedexEntry
Constructs the Delete Pokédex Entry form with a database connection.
deletePokemon(int) - Method in class BLL.PokemonBLL
Deletes a Pokémon after confirming the Pokémon exists.
deletePokemon(int) - Method in class DAL.PokemonDAL
Deletes a Pokémon from the database if the Pokémon exists.
DeletePokemon - Class in View.CRUDLogic
A GUI form for deleting a Pokémon from the database.
DeletePokemon(Connection, RefreshTableCallback) - Constructor for class View.CRUDLogic.DeletePokemon
Constructs the Delete Pokémon form with a database connection.
deleteRegion(int) - Method in class BLL.RegionBLL
Deletes a region after confirming the region exists.
deleteRegion(int) - Method in class DAL.RegionDAL
Deletes a region from the database if the region exists.
DeleteRegion - Class in View.CRUDLogic
A GUI form for deleting a region from the database.
DeleteRegion(Connection, RefreshTableCallback) - Constructor for class View.CRUDLogic.DeleteRegion
Constructs the Delete Region form with a database connection.
deleteTrainer(int) - Method in class BLL.TrainerBLL
Deletes a trainer after confirming the trainer exists.
deleteTrainer(int) - Method in class DAL.TrainerDAL
Deletes a trainer from the database if the trainer exists.
DeleteTrainer - Class in View.CRUDLogic
A GUI form for deleting a trainer from the database.
DeleteTrainer(Connection, RefreshTableCallback) - Constructor for class View.CRUDLogic.DeleteTrainer
Constructs the Delete Trainer form with a database connection.
deleteType(int) - Method in class BLL.TypeChartBLL
Deletes a type after confirming the type exists.
deleteType(int) - Method in class DAL.TypeChartDAL
Deletes a type from the database if the type exists.
DeleteType - Class in View.CRUDLogic
A GUI form for deleting a type from the database.
DeleteType(Connection, RefreshTableCallback) - Constructor for class View.CRUDLogic.DeleteType
Constructs the Delete Type form with a database connection.
disconnect() - Method in class DAL.DatabaseConnector
Closes the connection to the database if it's open.

G

getAllPokedexEntries() - Method in class BLL.PokedexBLL
Retrieves the list of all Pokédex entries.
getAllPokedexEntries() - Method in class DAL.PokedexDAL
Retrieves all Pokédex entries with associated types from the database.
getAllPokemon() - Method in class BLL.PokemonBLL
Retrieves the list of all Pokémon.
getAllPokemon() - Method in class DAL.PokemonDAL
Retrieves all Pokémon from the Pokémon table.
getAllRegions() - Method in class BLL.RegionBLL
Retrieves the list of all regions.
getAllRegions() - Method in class DAL.RegionDAL
Retrieves all regions from the Region table.
getAllTrainers() - Method in class BLL.TrainerBLL
Retrieves the list of all trainers.
getAllTrainers() - Method in class DAL.TrainerDAL
Retrieves all trainers from the Trainer table.
getAllTypeChartEntries() - Method in class BLL.TypeChartBLL
Retrieves the list of all type chart entries.
getAllTypeChartEntries() - Method in class DAL.TypeChartDAL
Retrieves all type chart entries from the TypeChart table.

getConnection() - Method in class DAL.DatabaseConnector
Closes the database connection if it is open.
getFrame() - Method in class View.RunLogic.GUIBuilder
Returns the main JFrame of the application.
getHometown() - Method in class DAL.Trainer
Returns the trainer's hometown.
getLevel() - Method in class DAL.Pokemon
Returns the Pokémon's level.
getPokedexNumber() - Method in class DAL.PokedexEntry
Returns the Pokédex entry's number
getPokedexNumber() - Method in class DAL.Pokemon
Returns the Pokémon's Pokédex number.
getPokedexNumberById(int) - Method in class DAL.PokemonDAL
Retrieves Pokédex number of a Pokémon based on its ID.
getPokemonDetails(int) - Method in class BLL.PokemonBLL
Retrieves detailed information about a Pokémon for display in delete confirmation.
getPokemonDetails(int) - Method in class DAL.PokemonDAL
Retrieves details of a Pokémon, including trainer name, trainer class, and species name.
getPokemonId() - Method in class DAL.Pokemon
Returns the Pokémon's ID.
getPokemonTypes() - Method in class DAL.PokedexEntry
Returns the Pokémon's types.
getRegionId() - Method in class DAL.PokedexEntry
Returns the Pokédex entry's region ID
getRegionId() - Method in class DAL.Region
Returns the region's ID.
getRegionName() - Method in class DAL.PokedexEntry
Returns the Pokédex entry's region name
getRegionName() - Method in class DAL.Region
Returns the region's name.
getRegionNameById(int) - Method in class BLL.RegionBLL
Retrieves the region's name by its ID.
getRegionNameById(int) - Method in class DAL.RegionDAL
Retrieves the region's name by its ID from the database.

getRowCount() - Method in class View.CRUDLogic.PokemonTable

getSpeciesName() - Method in class DAL.PokedexEntry

getSpeciesName() - Method in class DAL.Pokemon
Returns the Pokémon's species name.

Retrieves the Pokémon's species by the Pokédex number.
getSpeciesNameByPokedexNumber(int) - Method in class DAL.PokedexDAL
Retrieves the species name by its Pokédex number from the database.
getTrainerAge() - Method in class DAL.Trainer
Returns the trainer's age.
getTrainerClass() - Method in class DAL.Trainer
Returns the trainer's class.
getTrainerClassById(int) - Method in class BLL.TrainerBLL
Retrieves the trainer's class by their ID.
getTrainerClassById(int) - Method in class DAL.TrainerDAL
Retrieves the trainer's class by their ID from the database.
getTrainerId() - Method in class DAL.Pokemon
Returns the Pokémon's trainer's ID.
getTrainerId() - Method in class DAL.Trainer
Returns the trainer's ID.
getTrainerName() - Method in class DAL.Trainer
Returns the trainer's name.
getTrainerNameById(int) - Method in class BLL.TrainerBLL
Retrieves the trainer's name by their ID.
getTrainerNameById(int) - Method in class DAL.TrainerDAL
Retrieves the trainer's name by their ID from the database.
getTrainerTitle() - Method in class DAL.Pokemon
Returns the Pokémon's trainer title (class and name).
getTypeCountForPokedexNumber(int) - Method in class DAL.PokedexDAL
Retrieves the count of types assigned to a Pokémon by its Pokédex number.

Retrieves the type's name by its ID.

Retrieves the type's name by its ID from the database.
getTypes() - Method in class DAL.Pokemon
Returns the Pokémon's types (concatenated as a String).

GUIBuilder - Class in View.RunLogic
GUIBuilder is responsible for setting up the main frame of the application and initializing the graphical user interface (GUI) components.
GUIBuilder(int, int, DatabaseConnector) - Constructor for class View.RunLogic.GUIBuilder
Constructs a GUIBuilder object with the specified window dimensions, database connector, and database connection.
GUIExecute - Class in View.RunLogic
The GUIExecute class is responsible for managing the application startup process, including handling the login procedure and launching the main application GUI.
GUISetup - Class in View.RunLogic
GUISetup is responsible for setting up the graphical user interface (GUI) for the application.
GUISetup(JFrame, DatabaseConnector, Connection) - Constructor for class View.RunLogic.GUISetup
Constructor that initializes the GUI setup with the provided frame, database connector, and connection.

I

insertPokedexEntry(PokedexEntry) - Method in class DAL.PokedexDAL
Inserts a new Pokédex entry into the Pokédex table.
insertPokemon(Pokemon) - Method in class DAL.PokemonDAL
Inserts a new Pokémon into the Pokémon table.
insertRegion(Region) - Method in class DAL.RegionDAL
Inserts a new region into the Region table.
insertTrainer(Trainer) - Method in class DAL.TrainerDAL
Inserts a new trainer into the Trainer table.
insertTypeChartEntry(TypeChartEntry) - Method in class DAL.TypeChartDAL
Inserts a new type chart entry into the type chart table.

L

LoginWindow - Class in View.RunLogic
A GUI for user login to access the Pokémon Database.

The main method is the entry point of the application.

P

paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class View.RunLogic.CustomMenuBar
 
PokedexBLL - Class in BLL
Business Logic Layer (BLL) class for managing Pokédex entries.
PokedexBLL(Connection) - Constructor for class BLL.PokedexBLL
Constructor for PokedexBLL.
PokedexDAL - Class in DAL
Data Access Layer (DAL) class for performing CRUD operations on the Pokédex table.
PokedexDAL(Connection) - Constructor for class DAL.PokedexDAL
Constructor for PokedexDAL.
PokedexEntry - Class in DAL
This class represents an entry in the Pokédex.
PokedexEntry(int, String, int) - Constructor for class DAL.PokedexEntry
Constructor for creating a Pokédex object for insertion.
PokedexEntry(int, String, String, String) - Constructor for class DAL.PokedexEntry
Constructor for creating a Pokédex object for display.
pokedexEntryExists(int) - Method in class DAL.PokedexDAL
Checks if a Pokédex entry exists in the database based on the pokedexNumber.
PokedexTable - Class in View.CRUDLogic
Represents the table model for displaying a list of Pokédex entries.
PokedexTable(Connection) - Constructor for class View.CRUDLogic.PokedexTable
Constructor that initializes the table with Pokédex entry data from the database.
Pokemon - Class in DAL
This class represents a Pokémon in the system.
Pokemon(int, int, int) - Constructor for class DAL.Pokemon
Constructor for creating a Pokémon object for insert operations (without the pokemonId and types).
Pokemon(int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class DAL.Pokemon
Constructor for creating a Pokémon object when retrieving data from the database (with the pokemonId).
Pokemon(int, String, String, int, String) - Constructor for class DAL.Pokemon
Constructor for creating a Pokémon object when retrieving data from the database using the stored procedure (with the pokemonId).
PokemonBLL - Class in BLL
Business Logic Layer (BLL) class for managing Pokémon.
PokemonBLL(Connection) - Constructor for class BLL.PokemonBLL
Constructor for PokemonBLL.
PokemonDAL - Class in DAL
Data Access Layer (DAL) class for performing CRUD operations on the Pokémon table.
PokemonDAL(Connection) - Constructor for class DAL.PokemonDAL
Constructor for PokemonDAL.
pokemonExists(int) - Method in class DAL.PokemonDAL
Checks if a Pokémon exists in the database based on the pokemonId.
pokemonHasType(int, int) - Method in class DAL.PokedexDAL
Checks whether a Pokémon with a given Pokédex number has a specific type.
PokemonTable - Class in View.CRUDLogic
Represents the table model for displaying a list of Pokémon.
PokemonTable(Connection) - Constructor for class View.CRUDLogic.PokemonTable
Constructor that initializes the table with Pokémon data from the database.

R

refreshTable() - Method in interface View.CRUDLogic.RefreshTableCallback
Refreshes the relevant table, allowing the updated versoin to be displayed to the user.
RefreshTableCallback - Interface in View.CRUDLogic
Callback interface to refresh the corresponding table after adding data to the database.
Region - Class in DAL
This class represents a region in the system.
Region(int, String) - Constructor for class DAL.Region
Constructor for creating a Region object when retrieving data from the database (with the regionId).
Region(String) - Constructor for class DAL.Region
Constructor for creating a Region object for insert operations (without the regionId).
RegionBLL - Class in BLL
Business Logic Layer (BLL) class for managing regions.
RegionBLL(Connection) - Constructor for class BLL.RegionBLL
Constructor for RegionBLL.
RegionDAL - Class in DAL
Data Access Layer (DAL) class for performing CRUD operations on the Region table.
RegionDAL(Connection) - Constructor for class DAL.RegionDAL
Constructor for RegionDAL.
regionExists(int) - Method in class DAL.RegionDAL
Checks if a region exists in the database based on the regionId.
RegionTable - Class in View.CRUDLogic
Represents the table model for displaying a list of regions.
RegionTable(Connection) - Constructor for class View.CRUDLogic.RegionTable
Constructor that initializes the table with region data from the database.
removeType(int, int) - Method in class DAL.PokedexDAL
Removes a type from a Pokémon by deleting a value from the PokemonTypes Associative Entity table.
removeType(int, int, Connection) - Method in class BLL.PokedexBLL
Removes a type from a Pokédex entry in the database.
RemoveType - Class in View.CRUDLogic
A GUI form for removing a type from a Pokémon
RemoveType(Connection, RefreshTableCallback) - Constructor for class View.CRUDLogic.RemoveType
Constructs the RemoveType form with a database connection.
run() - Static method in class View.RunLogic.GUIExecute
Starts the login process by creating the LoginWindow.

S

setUpGUI() - Method in class View.RunLogic.GUISetup
Sets up the GUI components such as buttons, actions for button clicks, and window close event.

T

V

View.CRUDLogic - package View.CRUDLogic
Contains the graphical user interface (GUI) components of the application relating to button logic.
View.RunLogic - package View.RunLogic
Contains the graphical user interface (GUI) components of the application.
